hero.title: Building a skills-based learner journey
hero.lead: Here you'll find our learning strategy for the years ahead - what we're focused on in 2026, why it matters, and what you can expect to see happening throughout the year. Dive in and explore.

vision.quote: A structured, skills-based learner journey in Veida where every step has purpose - supported by social learning, performance support, nudging tools, mentoring, and active manager involvement.

framework.description: Each pillar addresses a different dimension of how people learn, grow, and perform. Together they form a complete ecosystem.
